intro: The Atlanta Falcons couldn’t have looked more like a different team by the end of the 2019 season. After starting the season 1-8, the Falcons looked set to fire head coach Dan Quinn and have a top pick in the 2020 NFL Draft. After a shocking 26-9 win in New Orleans, the Falcons went on a run, ending the season 6-2 and winning their last four games, giving Quinn another year.

intro: The NFL Draft is less than two weeks away, which means it’s time for mock draft season to come to a close. Thanks to COVID-19, there are no Pro Days to observe as the pre-draft process wraps itself up. While some players are performing their own isolated workouts, by and large, there will be no new information about these prospects between now and the NFL Draft. Based on everything the scouting community knows, let’s take a look at a seven-round mock draft for the Dallas Cowboys.
